issue_summary: Classic query parser: disallow autoGeneratePhraseQueries=true when splitOnWhitespace=false (and vice-versa).
javadoc_before: /** * Whether query text should be split on whitespace prior to analysis. * Default is {@value #DEFAULT_SPLIT_ON_WHITESPACE}. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Whether query text should be split on whitespace prior to analysis. * Default is {@value #DEFAULT_SPLIT_ON_WHITESPACE}. *

* The combination splitOnWhitespace=false and autoGeneratePhraseQueries=true * is disallowed. See LUCENE-7533. */
